description:
This node provides Twitch raid information from a TwitchInterface. 

Note that all outputs are generated on a new Twitch raid event, and will not display any information when connected to a display node.

fields.OnRaid: Fires on receiving a new Twitch raid.
fields.UserId: Outputs the Twitch Channel ID of the raider.
fields.DisplayName: Outputs the Twitch username of the raider.
fields.Color: Outputs the Twitch chat color of the raider.
fields.ViewerCount: Shows the amount of viewers who are raiding with the raider.
fields.IsSubscriber: Shows if the raider is subscribed to the Twitch channel.
